title: Junk Dropper
description: Instantly drops junk items from your inventory with a single keybind while keeping your kit safe. Ideal for PvP and arena servers.
body:
🗑️Junk Dropper

Junk Dropper is a lightweight utility mod that helps keep your inventory clean during PvP and arena fights.

While fighting, random or low-level players often die nearby and their useless loot (junk items) gets added to your inventory. This fills up your inventory and distracts you during combat.
Junk Dropper solves this problem with a simple keybind.

# - **Features**
You can change the keybind from settings<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/6KqQci1xpj8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Press a keybind to instantly drop junk items **:Note:** Default Keybind Is K

Only trash items are dropped

Your kit (armor, weapons, tools) is always protected

Perfect for PvP and Arena gameplay

Fast, lightweight, and easy to use

Best for servers like FireMC and other practice PvP servers

# **- How It Works**

A player dies during a fight

Their junk loot enters your inventory

You press the keybind

Junk items drop, your kit stays safe

# **- Best For**

FireMC

Practice & PvP servers

Arena fights

Preventing inventory clutter
